  /* 100Hz */ {100, 1000, 81}, {100, 1100, 91}, {100, 1200, 93}, {100, 1300, 103}, {100, 1400, 113}, {100, 1500, 123}, {100, 1600, 133}, {100, 1700, 143}, {100, 1800, 145}, {100, 1900, 155}, {100, 2000, 165},
